name: Cat's Eye Elixir
description:
Activate (1 Action) (manipulate)

After you consume this elixir, your vision sharpens and you become sensitive to even the most minute movements.

For the next minute, you reduce the flat check to target Hidden creatures to DC 5 Flat check, and you don't need to attempt a flat check to target Concealed creatures. These benefits apply only against creatures within 30 feet of you.
